params.name: heading
params.description: Text shown in the colored label block for the Card / Callout. Ignored if `headingHtml` is provided.

params.name: headingHtml
params.description: HTML to use inside the heading.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Optional semantic heading level for the label. Default: 3. This changes the HTML heading tag, not the visual styling.

params.name: html
params.description: HTML to use inside the callout body. When this is provided, it replaces `text`.

params.name: text
params.description: Plain text to use inside the callout body. Ignored if `html` is provided.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the root Card / Callout element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes to add to the root Card / Callout element, for example an `id`, `data-*` attribute or `aria-*` attribute.
